label: Advisor
_note: Operator-authored build spine for the Orionfold Advisor proof (AD-AE-14 fix; spec _SPECS/orionfold-advisor-nvidia-native-v1.md). Read by GET /api/build + /api/run-context via FK_ARENA_BUILD_DIR pointed at this dir (set in .env.local, sourced by arena_lifecycle.sh). Stage `artifacts` paths are relative to this dir and AE-26-verified against disk, `rows` claims a JSONL line count. Honest states only: no base is locked and nothing is publishable until the §14 gates pass.

scout.headline: 30B-A3B leads 7/8 · base not locked
scout.detail: raw floors via visible Cortex preflight: Nano 9B /no_think 1/8 · Qwen2.5-7B 5/8 (comparison) · Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B /no_think + format exemplar 7/8 — §14 ≥7/8 pre-SFT bar met without training

bench.headline: advisor-bench v0.1 · 75 pool + 28 held-out
bench.detail: frozen held-out · ≥15 refusal/private-state boundary cases · eval seed, not SFT data

corpus.headline: 181 public-safe sources · recall@5 0.9885
corpus.detail: public-corpus-manifest with source_role + book_surface metadata · private/operator state excluded · local BM25 recall gate green (1.0 held-out answerable); live Cortex-lane recall re-run still owed before publish claims

sft.headline: deferred — 7/8 floor met without training
sft.detail: sole open class is the 0082 grounding over-refusal; SFT re-enters only with wider-slice signal (30B-A3B is MoE, NeMo SFT path unproven)

rlvr.headline: not armed
rlvr.detail: RL only if a future SFT receipt is neither saturated nor sparse (spec §13.E)

publish.headline: routing probe + live recall + 8/8 receipt first
publish.detail: §13.F route bakeoff (T1 local → governed escalation) → §14 gates → publish or rejection receipt; no public Advisor positioning until then
